friendly_name: Session Research Trace and Multiplicity Disclosure
source_description: Session-scoped, append-only research trace at the MCP boundary that mechanically records every analytical tool call, derives a measured multiplicity disclosure (K user-facing findings among N unique hypotheses examined), and exposes a stable audit-consumer contract for a later audit skill. Engine stays pure. Design captured in docs/planning/research-trace-multiplicity-audit.md and design decision note 0009.
